texto: The familiar song of a night-singing nightingale rises from somewhere in the garden. A nightingale that in this season of cold should not be in the garden, a nightingale that in a thousand verses of Iranian poetry, in the hours of darkness, for the love of a red rose and in sorrow of its separation from it, has forever sung and will forever sing.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Shahriar Mandanipour sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “The familiar song of a night-singing nightingale rises from somewhere in the garden. A nightingal…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, birds-in-fiction, iran, útil em momentos de reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.

texto: I was afflicted with a familiar attack of discovering my own loneliness. From time to time I suffer this emotional attack, especially when I am happy, when I have succeeded at something, and on those rare occasions when I am pleased with myself. Immediately, a gentle and soothing sorrow engulfs my entire being.
explicacao: Citação de Shahriar Mandanipour sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I was afflicted with a familiar attack of discovering my own loneliness. From time to time I suff…” articula felicidade, emotions, loneliness em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como loneliness.

Immediately, a gentle and soothing sorrow engulfs my entire being.

texto: Although my work is to grapple with words, I have no words with which to describe and explain this feeling. Perhaps I write stories to show that in life there are moments, emotions, and events that cannot be explained with words.
explicacao: Citação de Shahriar Mandanipour sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Although my work is to grapple with words, I have no words with which to describe and explain thi…” articula tempo, emotions, writing em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e writing.
